content.rendered:
On this page, you can find an overview of articles that contain vocabulary that’s more advanced. Note that I tend to collect a lot of random vocabulary. Not all of it is especially important for you personally to know. I am simply listing words; it is your responsibility to choose which words you will need. There is also no reason to learn these topics in the order presented. It is good to cherry pick the vocabulary that is relevant to you personal rather than learning everything available by heart.

Please also check out my vocabulary lists for intermediate learners! While I’ve put those topics in the “intermediate” category, everything depends on your interests. A topic that might seemingly be difficult might be important to you as a learner when it lines up with your interests. I’m just one person, and this is my own view of the difficulty level of these vocabulary topics.

Vocabulary for beginners

FINNISH VOCABULARY FOR ADVANCED LEARNERS

1. Science

    • Intelligence
    • Geography
    • Mathematics
    • Physics
    • Chemistry
    • Chemical elements

2. Art

    • Music
    • Musical instruments
    • Visual arts
    • Literature
    • Acting
    • Fairytales

3. Nature

    • Earth, water and sky
    • Space and planets
    • Flowers
    • Trees
    • Global warming
    • Animal body parts
    • Animal comparisons
    • Animal compounds

4. Society

    • Government and politics
    • Elections
    • Social security
    • The press
    • Law and crime
    • War and peace
    • Communication
    • Money
    • Houses and buildings
    • Social media
    • Clickbait

Professional life

    • Talking about work experience
    • Job interview in Finnish
    • Job interview adjectives
    • Giving a presentation
    • Construction work

Writing and reading

    • Finnish abbreviations
    • Punctuation
    • Symbols @ #
    • The Lord’s Prayer

Problems

    • Car accidents
    • Car problems
    • Computer problems
    • Emergency situations
    • Return policies
    • Telephone problems

Body and mind

    • Body care products
    • Bodily functions
    • Nouns describing personality
    • The senses

Random words

    • Aika
    • Heinä
    • Kissa
    • The color green

Other topics

    • Tiny things
    • Superheroes
    • Renovating
    • Nouns with opposites
    • Verbs with opposites
